---
title: 'The Word in my mouth IS my deliverance!'
date: '2012-01-26T08:25:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3273633675443025144'
blogger_filename: '/2012/01/the-word-in-my-mouth-is-my-deliverance.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Word of The Lord'
  - 'Prayer Time'
---

Holy Spirit has been dealing with me for a few weeks now about words, specifically for the last 24 hours. Words are the seed. Words are the&nbsp;controlling&nbsp;factor of life.<br /><br />From Nancy Dufresne on the<a href="http://www.facebook.com/photo.php?fbid=290721187652000&amp;set=a.151590698231717.30624.141097082614412&amp;type=1" target="_blank"><span id="goog_1293065035"></span> Ed Dufresne Ministries Facebook<span id="goog_1293065036"></span></a> page:<br /><br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="http://www.facebook.com/photo.php?fbid=290721187652000&amp;set=a.151590698231717.30624.141097082614412&amp;type=1" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/pastor-nancy-dufresne-6425f6d1c5c6.jpg" /></a></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: center;"><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px; text-align: left;">Here's words of utterance from this mornings service with Pastor Nancy:</span></div><div style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px;"><br /></span></div><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px; text-align: left;"></span><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px; text-align: left;"><b>"The Word is enough! The Word is enough! The Word is enough!"</b></span></div><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px; text-align: left;"></span><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px;"><b><br /></b></span></div><b><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px; text-align: left;"></span></b><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><b><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px; text-align: left;">"To Faith, the Word is the voice of God."</span></b></div><b><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px; text-align: left;"></span><span class="text_exposed_show" style="background-color: white; display: inline; text-align: left;"></span></b><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><b><span class="text_exposed_show" style="background-color: white; display: inline; text-align: left;"><span style="font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px;"><br /></span></span></b></div><b><span class="text_exposed_show" style="background-color: white; display: inline; text-align: left;"><span style="font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px;"><div style="text-align: center;">"The Word in my mouth is my deliverance."</div></span><div style="text-align: center;"><br /></div><span style="font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px;"><div style="text-align: center;">"The good fight of faith is a fight of words." referencing Proverbs 12:6</div></span><div style="text-align: center;"><br /></div><span style="font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px;"><div style="text-align: center;">"Your victory is waiting for faith to be applied."</div></span><div style="text-align: center;"><br /></div><span style="font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px;"><div style="text-align: center;">"Meditation puts you in the verse and the verse in you."</div></span><div style="text-align: center;"><br /></div><span style="font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px;"><div style="text-align: center;">"The heart is only the storage place for Faith...and with the mouth it flows out!"</div></span></span></b><br /><b><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px; text-align: left;"></span></b><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><b><b style="background-color: transparent;"><br /></b></b></div><div style="text-align: center;"><b><b style="background-color: transparent;">Ed Dufresne: "You've got to say it to move it...That's how God rolls!"</b></b></div><br /><br />It is Words that will bring provision or keep it from coming. I keep going back, over and over, to the Word of the Lord given through Pastor Nancy Dufresne and Ed Dufresne several years ago.<br /><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><b>"When your manner of speech changes from&nbsp;</b></div><div style="text-align: center;"><b>'I need it'&nbsp;</b></div><div style="text-align: center;"><b>to&nbsp;</b></div><div style="text-align: center;"><b>'I got it'&nbsp;</b></div><div style="text-align: center;"><b>than the things you've been needing can come in to your life..."</b></div><br /><div style="font-weight: bold; text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; line-height: 14px;"><br /></span></div><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; line-height: 14px; text-align: left;"><div style="text-align: center;"><br /></div></span><br /><br />I need to spend more time praying about the everyday words, thoughts, images, and&nbsp;imaginations&nbsp;that I permit in my life.<br /><br />Darrell G. Wolfe
